summary: The student has shown strengths in Writing Task 2, achieving a band 7.5, but has areas for improvement in Speaking Part 2, where they struggle with fluency, sentence structure, and vocabulary. In Reading and Listening, the student has demonstrated a need for improvement, with estimated band scores of 6.25 and 5.0 respectively. To reach the target band of 7.5, the student needs to focus on developing their speaking skills, improving their reading comprehension, and enhancing their listening abilities.
priorities: Improve Speaking Part 2 fluency and sentence structure

tasks: Practice speaking about a familiar topic for 2 minutes without hesitation or fillers
Record yourself and review your performance, focusing on sentence structure and grammar
Read a passage from Cambridge IELTS book 14, Test 2, and attempt to answer the questions
Review your answers and analyze your mistakes, focusing on identifying the main ideas and supporting details
Listen to a recording from the official IELTS website and attempt to answer the questions
Review your answers and analyze your mistakes, focusing on identifying the main ideas and supporting details
Practice speaking about a familiar topic for 2 minutes, focusing on using precise vocabulary
Record yourself and review your performance, focusing on vocabulary usage
Read a passage from Cambridge IELTS book 10, Test 3, and attempt to answer the questions
Review your answers and analyze your mistakes, focusing on identifying the main ideas and supporting details
Listen to a recording from the official IELTS website and attempt to answer the questions
Review your answers and analyze your mistakes, focusing on identifying the main ideas and supporting details
Attempt a full timed practice test for Speaking, Reading, and Listening
Review your performance and analyze your mistakes, focusing on identifying areas for improvement
